query: SELECT writeType, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.orgSlug') as orgSlug, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.taskId') as taskId, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.testKey') as testKey, COUNT(*) as dupes FROM notionRetryQueue WHERE status = 'pending' GROUP BY writeType, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.orgSlug'), JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.taskId'), JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.testKey') HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT writeType, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.orgSlug') as orgSlug, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.taskId') as taskId, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.testKey') as testKey, COUNT(*) as dupes FROM notionRetryQueue WHERE status = 'pending' GROUP BY writeType, JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.orgSlug'), JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.taskId'), JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.testKey') HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 LIMIT 10;
